zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Zouche於大約1485年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾可德諾時，她的父親Sir John Zouche32歲，母親Eleanor St John32歲。她於1503年與Gerald FitzGerald在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達吉爾達 安德 拉森加結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1517年10月6日在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達爾布利其盧卡享年33歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達格雷 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Zouche于大约1485年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾可德諾时，她的父亲Sir John Zouche32岁，母亲Eleanor St John32岁。她于1503年与Gerald FitzGerald在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達吉爾達 安德 拉森加结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1517年10月6日在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達爾布利其盧卡享年33岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達格雷 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse, Chantal, Dominique, Francois, Herve, Michel, Rodolphe, Serge.
French (Fouché): variant of Foucher . Compare Fooshee , Foshee , Fouch , and Foushee .
Altered form (Fouché) of French Foucher (compare 1 above), found mainly in South Africa.

variants.name: Foucher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Etienne, Henri, Lydie, Marcel, Rosaire.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Folchari, composed of the elements folk, folc ‘people’ and hari ‘army’. Compare Faucher 2.

variants.name: Foushee
meanings: History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its original form Fouché) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Fouch
meanings: Altered form of   Fouts  , a surname of German origin.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Fudge  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Zouche was born about 1485, in Codnor, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Zouche, was 32 and her mother, Eleanor St John, was 32. She married Gerald FitzGerald in 1503, in Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 6 October 1517, in Lucan, Celbridge, County Kildare, Ireland, at the age of 33, and was buried in Grey Abbey, County Kildare, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Zouche est née environ 1485, à Codnor, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Zouche, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Eleanor St John, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Gerald FitzGerald en 1503, à Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 octobre 1517, à Lucan, Celbridge, County Kildare, Irlande, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterrée à Grey Abbey, County Kildare, Irlande.

de.Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, I: Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, Irland
de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Zouche um 1485 in Codnor, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Zouche 32 und ihre Mutter Eleanor St John 32. Sie hat 1503 in Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, Irland Gerald FitzGerald geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Oktober 1517 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Lucan, Celbridge, County Kildare, Irland und wurde in Grey Abbey, County Kildare, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Zouche è nata il circa 1485 nel Codnor, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Zouche, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Eleanor St John, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Gerald FitzGerald nel 1503, nel Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 ottobre 1517, nel Lucan, Celbridge, County Kildare, Irlanda, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolta a Grey Abbey, County Kildare, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Zoucheが約1485年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアコドノーで生まれた時，父Sir John Zoucheは32歳，母Eleanor St Johnは32歳であった。1503年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアキルダア アンド ラサンガンでGerald FitzGeraldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1517年10月6日にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアセルブリッジルカンで33歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ キルダアグリー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, I: 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 킬더르 앤드 래스아그가
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Zouche(이)가 대략 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 코드너에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Zouche(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor St John(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1503년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 킬더르 앤드 래스아그가에서 Gerald FitzGerald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1517년 10월 6일 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 세브리지 뤼컨에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 그레이 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Zouche nasceu aproximadamente 1485, em Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Zouche, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor St John, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Gerald FitzGerald em 1503, em Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de outubro de 1517, em Lucan, Celbridge, County Kildare, Irlanda, com 33 anos, e foi sepultada em Grey Abbey, County Kildare, Irlanda.

ru.Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, I: каилдар анд ратанган, коунти каилдар, Ирландия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Zouche родилась около 1485 г. в местности коднор, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Zouche было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor St John, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gerald FitzGerald в 1503 г. в местности каилдар анд ратанган, коунти каилдар, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 6 октября 1517 г. в местности лукан, селбридж, коунти каилдар, Ирландия в возрасте 33 лет и была похоронена в местности гри эбби, коунти каилдар, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Zouche nació aproximadamente 1485, en Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Zouche, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Eleanor St John, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Gerald FitzGerald en 1503, en Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de octubre de 1517, en Lucan, Celbridge, County Kildare, Irlanda, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultada en Grey Abbey, County Kildare, Irlanda.
